creator: timbob@bigpond.com
text:
Hello Naram,

Does the upgraded mingw32-libgmp4 pass a `make check' on your
installation? It failed on mine last week.

> NOTE: I'd be willing to take over maintainership for this port.

I would be glad to hand over maintainership provided that you don't
mind coordinating with the maintainers (CCed) of lang/mlton, which
requires mingw32-libgmp4 to cross-compile to Win32.

(RE: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/139937)

Tim.
